name: chromium-mcp
description: Launch and control Chromium on your local machine.

url_filter_mode.title: URL Filter Mode
url_filter_mode.description: allowlist — only open URLs matching the patterns. blocklist — open everything except matched URLs.

url_patterns.title: URL Patterns
url_patterns.description: Comma-separated patterns to allow or block (e.g. https://example.com/*,https://*.google.com/*). Leave empty to apply no filter.

tools.name: launch_chromium
tools.description: Launch Chromium or Google Chrome, optionally opening a URL.

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Open a URL in Chromium (launches the browser if not running).

tools.name: detect_chromium
tools.description: Detect whether Chromium or Chrome is installed and return the binary path.
